generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in the Pacific are quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to foot the bill? A recent report shows that Japan's defense spending as a percentage of GDP has dropped to just 0.9%—lower than it was a decade ago. Meanwhile, they're pushing for us to increase our commitment to their security. It's time we have an honest conversation about who's really carrying the burden in our alliances. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
